library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra setup is required: tomcat-embed-core is an in-process embedded servlet container, its POM only adds tomcat-annotations-api transitively, and the reported failure is reachable through Connector.getProperty/setProperty without Docker, external services, or additional Maven dependencies.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required for the targeted coverage. Tests can exercise the Spring Boot failure path directly with org.apache.catalina.connector.Connector by calling getProperty("bindOnInit") and setProperty("bindOnInit", "false"); if starting Tomcat, bind to port 0 rather than a fixed port.
risks: A broader Spring Boot PetClinic-style reproduction would introduce many unrelated dependencies and is unnecessary for this metadata issue.
Starting a full embedded server is optional; if used, fixed ports may be flaky, so use Tomcat/Connector auto-bind port 0.
